lines.en: I will never die

lines.ja: 夢中で走ったこの道の途中で
lines.en: Somewhere along this road I've been sprinting down,

lines.ja: 何度も何度も躓いて転んで
lines.en: I've tripped and fallen over and over again
The future I'd drawn for myself
went out of sight, and still —
I didn't want to give up
I will never die
I will never end

lines.ja: その先へ行けるならば
lines.en: if I can make it beyond this,
I will never die
I will never end
I'll ride the sound turning through me
I will never die

lines.ja: 独りで悩んで見出した活路も
lines.en: The way out I found on my own through all that worry,

lines.ja: 忘れてたものを取り戻した夜も
lines.en: the night I got back something I'd forgotten,
no matter when it was,
you were there, singing for me
leading me along by the hand
I will never die

lines.ja: 変わっていく時代の中で輝いてる
lines.en: Shining brightly inside a world that keeps changing,

lines.ja: 君ともう少し未来へ進むために
lines.en: just so I can move a little further into the future with you
I will never die
I will never end

lines.ja: その先へ行けるならば
lines.en: if I can make it beyond this,
I will never die
I will never end
I'll ride the sound turning through me
I will never die
I will never die
